first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and both evaluations correctly identify the same critical flaw: a lack of the required 8 years of C++ experience. The core justification, strengths, and primary concerns are substantively identical across both versions, focusing on this C++ mismatch. The minor difference in the third listed concern is well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and does not appear to be influenced by the change in work location from Western cities to Brazil.
